commands: five serialized Windows candidate test commands
validation.summary: Five cells and 20 scenarios pass for Windows 10.0.26200 x64; raw transcript/platform digests validate and the runner reports zero diagnostics.

review.evidence: Windows evidence is candidate-bound and does not assert macOS, Linux, Codex, or Claude readiness.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Exact Windows cells cover reuse/concurrency, refusal, bounded stdio, recovery/no-replay, clean drift, adoption zero-write, and adapter takeover.
Every receipt names Windows 10.0.26200 x64 and standalone surfaces only; no cross-OS or host claim is emitted.

recovery: Runner now ignores raw/ JSON receipt payloads when discovering evidence-cell documents; those files remain digest-verified through cell refs.
